text: The OCIP policies apply only to work performed at the PROJECT SITE by ENROLLED PARTIES. ENROLLED PARTIES must provide their own insurance for off-site activities including, but not limited to, work at their permanent shops, fabrication or manufacturing of building products, materials or supplies. The insurance required of ENROLLED PARTIES and EXCLUDED PARTIES is set forth in full in the Insurance section of your Contract. OWNER purchased insurance in no way relieves any party of their contractor responsibilities.
